name: Long-horizon resource grind 002
objective: Use conservative sequencing to outlast a symmetric resource exchange.

avoid: unnecessary extra commitment into an even board

successConditions: Player 0 ends the horizon with a stronger board or hand position.
failureConditions: Player 0 gives up resource parity for negligible damage.
notes: Tests long-term value judgment in a symmetric race.

scoring.rationale: Rewards resource parity management and conservative commitment.
